{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Pattern Construction
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pattern Construction]] is a process used for summoning a goddess.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pattern Construction]] is a technique or ritual used by the [[Tanakites]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
